title: Representative for the group claim
p1: The tribunal will usually communicate with one person in the claimant party. If you do not have a legal representative, this can be an individual in the group claim. That individual will act as the representative for the group.
p2: The group claim representative is responsible for:
bullet1: receiving all communication as the claim progresses
bullet2: making requests and applications to the tribunal
bullet3: telling the other individuals in the group claim when there are updates to the claim
p3: You can change the representative, or add a legal representative as the claim progresses.

p4.start: If you have a legal representative, they must complete the

legend: Do you agree to be the group claim representative?
yes: Yes, I agree to being the group claim representative
no: No, I do not agree to being the group claim representative
noHint: If the claim is accepted, the tribunal will contact all parties to discuss who should be the group representative.

leadClaimant.required: Tell us if you agree to be the group claim representative
